name: chat-commit
description: Save and resume GitHub Copilot Chat sessions linked to git commits

commands.title: Chat Commit: Save Current Chat Session

chat-commit.storagePath.description: Folder (relative to workspace root) where chat sessions are saved.

chat-commit.autoSaveOnCommit.description: Automatically save the active chat session when a git commit is made.

chat-commit.includeInGitignore.description: Add the storage folder to .gitignore. By default sessions are tracked in source control.

chat-commit.resume.maxTurns.description: Maximum number of turns to inject as context when resuming a saved session.

enumDescriptions: Summarize older turns into a preamble using the LLM, then include the most recent turns verbatim.
Silently drop the oldest turns until within the limit.
Load only the most recent N turns with a note about omitted turns.
chat-commit.resume.overflowStrategy.description: What to do when a session exceeds resume.maxTurns or resume.maxContextChars.

chat-commit.resume.maxContextChars.description: Hard cap on total characters injected as context when resuming. Overflow is handled by resume.overflowStrategy.

chat-commit.save.maxFileSize.patternErrorMessage: Must be a size like '500kb' or '1mb'.
chat-commit.save.maxFileSize.description: Maximum size per saved session file. Sessions exceeding this are handled by save.overflowStrategy.

enumDescriptions: Split the session into multiple part files linked by metadata.
Drop the oldest turns until the session fits within the size limit.
Save the session as-is and show a warning notification.
chat-commit.save.overflowStrategy.description: What to do when a saved session file exceeds save.maxFileSize.

chat-commit.save.stripToolOutput.description: Strip verbose tool call outputs (e.g. file contents, terminal output) from saved turns to reduce file size. Tool call names and summaries are preserved.

chat-commit.save.maxSavedSessions.description: Maximum number of session files to keep in the storage folder. 0 means unlimited. When exceeded, the oldest sessions are handled by save.pruneAction.

enumDescriptions: Move the oldest sessions to a .archive/ subfolder.
chat-commit.save.pruneAction.description: What to do with the oldest sessions when save.maxSavedSessions is exceeded.

commands.name: resume
commands.description: Resume a previously saved chat session by injecting it as context

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all saved chat sessions with metadata

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile
